caption: A person with light-colored hair wearing a dark shirt and a headset is seen in a small video overlay in the lower-left corner, smiling against a background featuring a Christmas tree. The main screen displays a football video game menu titled "SELECT A PLAY" over a wide shot of a stadium. The interface includes various options such as "COACH SUGGESTIONS," "PLAYER," "FORMATION," "CONCEPT," and "PLAY TYPE." A central panel highlights plays like "Z SPOT" and "INSIDE ZONE," while a "PREVIOUS PLAY" section mentions "MIKE BLITZ 0" and "FOUR VERTICALS." Game status indicators at the top show "3rd & 6" and a clock at "2:33." Between the first and second images, the menu remains static. In the third and fourth images, the "SELECT A PLAY" menu and the detailed play diagrams disappear, leaving the stadium background and the status bar, while the person in the overlay continues to smile.
